name: Factorial HR API
what_it_does: All-in-one HR platform for European SMBs with REST API — managing employees, time tracking, leave management, payroll, and ATS in a single platform, with Spanish/EU regulatory compliance and API for HRIS integration.
use_cases: Syncing employee data from Factorial to external systems via REST API
Querying time tracking and absence data for payroll integration
Accessing employee documents and payslips via API for custom HR portals
Integrating Factorial with accounting software for payroll data export
not_for: Large enterprise with complex global HR requirements (use Workday or SuccessFactors)
US-only companies without European operations (US payroll not supported)
Complex global mobility and expat management
best_when: A European (especially Spanish) SMB needs an all-in-one HRIS with payroll, time tracking, and ATS in one platform with EU regulatory compliance.
avoid_when: You need US payroll, enterprise-scale HR, or are outside Europe where Factorial has limited compliance support.

auth.notes: OAuth2 Authorization Code for integrations. API key option for direct access. Scoped access per HR resource type. Company-scoped access. Access token with refresh for long-lived integrations.

pricing.paid_tiers: Essential from €5/employee/month; Business from €8/employee/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: No free tier. Employee-based pricing. Spanish company (Barcelona). Unicorn (€1B+ valuation). Strong European market presence — Germany, Spain, France, UK, Italy. EU payroll support. API access on Business plan and above.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; not publicly detailed

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covering employees, time tracking, leaves, documents, and payroll. OAuth2 for integrations. Webhook support for HR events. Documentation adequate but not comprehensive. Growing API as product matures.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Employee reads idempotent. Time entry creation creates new records. Leave request creation creates new requests. Employee updates idempotent for same values.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires Business plan or above
EU payroll calculations differ by country — Factorial handles country-specific rules
API documentation less mature than Bamboo HR or Personio
OAuth2 required for integrations — no simple API key for production use

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant — Spanish/EU company. EU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Employee PII with GDPR controls. No formal SOC2 published. European regulatory compliance (labor law) built into platform.
